rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion For Assignment Orders And Restraining Order And Order Regarding Receiver Herein
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 10, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF DALE DUNCAN, MARTA MUNOZ MENDOZA MOTION / Notice Of Motion For Assignment Orders And Restraining Order And Order Regarding Receiver Herein is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The Motion for Restraining Order to the receivers, Kevin Singer and Kevin Whalen, is granted. Pending an accounting and order for distribution, no distribution of any kind may be made except for payment of court costs and administrative expenses for sale (not including attorney fees or receivership expenses). Motion is otherwise denied. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BYRNE'S SPECIAL WORKS LLC VS. MARTIN ENG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Martin Eng'S Motion To Set Aside Default Of Defendant Martin Eng
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 10, 2020 line 2. Defendant Martin Eng'S Motion To Set Aside Default Of Defendant Martin Eng is DENIED. Notice of Motion indicates that it is based on request for mandatory relief. No evidence is provided for such request, i.e. request based on counsel mistake, surprise or excusable neglect. Motion discusses discretionary relief under CCP 473(b) and relief under CCP 473.5. Defendant does not meet his procedural and substantive burden under either statute. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CATHERINE HERRERA WATSON VS. TONY GARNICKI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To Amend For Hearing September 10, 2020 With Proposed Amended Complaint Cgc-18-572340
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 10,2020. line 3. PLAINTIFF CATHERINE WATSON Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To Amend For Hearing September 10, 2020 With Proposed Amended Complaint Cgc-18-572340 is OFF CALENDAR. This motion was filed on August 4, 2020. Proposed Amended Complaint appears to include a cause of action for breach of contract. On August 6, 2020 this Court GRANTED a Motion for Summary Adjudication of Plaintiff's cause of action for breach of contract. Plaintiff may re-notice a motion for leave to amend if necessary and proper consistent with the ruling on motion for summary adjudication. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SOLANGE ELIZABETH CARCAMO PACHECO ET AL VS. SIC-MCM 825 POST STREET, L.P. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 10,2020. line 4. DEFENDANT SIC-MCM GP, LLC, 825 POST STREET, L.P., MOSSER COMPANIES, INC., NEVO MOSSER DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to October 21, 2020. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and the Court's prior minute order and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, operative complaint, and reply by no later than September 14, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. If courtesy copies are not received, the motion will be taken off calendar. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SOLANGE ELIZABETH CARCAMO PACHECO ET AL VS. SIC-MCM 825 POST STREET, L.P. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 10,2020. line 4. DEFENDANT SIC-MCM GP, LLC, 825 POST STREET, L.P., MOSSER COMPANIES, INC., NEVO MOSSER MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is continued to October 21, 2020. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and the Court's prior minute order and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, operative complaint, and reply by no later than September 14, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. If courtesy copies are not received, the motion will be taken off calendar. =(501/CFH)
